Headline: #77 Belmont |Temporary Eastbound Reroute near Lakeshore/Diversey
ShortDescription: Eastbound  77 Belmont buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont, Sheridan, Cannon Drive, Lakeshore West and Diversey: due to, street blockage near Diversey.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Eastbound #77 Belmont buses are temporarily rerouted via Belmont, Sheridan, Cannon Drive, Lakeshore West and Diversey: due to, street blockage near Diversey.

Westbound buses are not affected.

Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #44 Wallace/Racine Temporary Reroute at Wallace/35th
ShortDescription: #44 Wallace/Racine buses are temp. rerouted in both directions due to construction near Wallace/35th.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
How does this affect my trip?

#44 Wallace/Racine buses temp. rerouted near Wallace/35th.

Northbound buses will operate via Wallace, 35th, Halsted, 31st and Wallace including the normal route streets.

Southbound buses will operate via Wallace, 31st, Halsted, 35th and Wallace.

Allow extra travel time.

Why is service being changed?

Buses are rerouted due to construction near Wallace/35th.

#146 Inner Lake Shore/Michigan Express, #147 Outer DuSable Lake Shore Express , #151 Sheridan  buses temp. rerouted due to street blockage near Chicago/Michigan.

Headline: #66 Chicago Temporary Reroute near Chicago/Michigan.

Headline: Service Between 54th/Cermak and Polk, then UIC/Halsted (Blue Line) Stations, Only
ShortDescription: Pink Line service has been temporarily suspended between Polk and the Loop due signal problems at Ashland/Lake.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Pink Line service has been temporarily suspended between Polk and the Loop due signal problems at Ashland/Lake.

As a result, Pink Line trains are running as follows:

Between 54th/Cermak and Polk, and then are diverted to UIC/Halsted on the Blue Line for direct connections at UIC/Halsted to continuing Blue Line train service to/from downtown.

Using connecting Blue Line service:

For service to downtown from Pink Line stations between 54th/Cermak and Polk, take a Pink Line train toward the Loop and stay on board until the train reaches UIC/Halsted on the Blue Line. Transfer to an O'Hare-bound Blue Line train from the same platform for service into downtown.

For service from downtown to Pink Line stations between Polk and 54th/Cermak, take a Blue Line train toward Forest Park to UIC/Halsted. Stay on the same platform side and wait for a 54th/Cermak-bound Pink Line train.

Shuttle buses are available from Ashland/Lake to Polk to provide connecting service in both directions. 

Other possible alternatives may include: 

#9 Ashland
#21 Cermak
#49 Western
#50 Damen
#52 Kedzie/California
#53 Pulaski
#54 Cicero
#60 Blue Island-26th
...including to/from and in combination with other 'L' services.

Note that if you take a bus to/from the Pink Line, you may also be able to connect to/from the Blue Line's Forest Park branch or Green Line along Lake Street directly via that bus route.

See station personnel for further assistance, and pay attention to announcements on trains and at stations for service information.

We are working to restore service as quickly as possible. Allow extra travel time.

Headline: #63 63rd Temporary Eastbound Reroute at 63rd/Stony Island
ShortDescription: 63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
#63 63rd buses will terminate at 63rd/Stony Island due to a beach terminal closure because of overcrowding.

Headline: Purple Line Service Delayed near Linden
ShortDescription: Purple Line trains are standing near Linden due to signal problems. Crews working to restore service.

FullDescription.#cdata-section:
Purple Line trains are standing near Linden due to signal problems. 

At this time, also consider other service alternatives that may serve your trip, such as nearby bus routes, or using buses to other rail lines.

Personnel are working to restore service. Allow extra travel time.
